query: SELECT opportunitySource, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM dispo_properties WHERE tenantId = 1 AND opportunitySource IS NOT NULL AND opportunitySource != '' GROUP BY opportunitySource ORDER BY cnt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT opportunitySource, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM dispo_properties WHERE tenantId = 1 AND opportunitySource IS NOT NULL AND opportunitySource != '' GROUP BY opportunitySource ORDER BY cnt DESC
